---
title: "Activities"
output: html_document
---

# Activities

## Teaching
Short descriptions of workshops and courses I’ve delivered.

- Workshop (University) — high‑level description and learning outcomes  
- Undergraduate course — topic and responsibilities  

## Portfolio / Community / Mentoring
Selected non‑research activities and community contributions.

- **Corona News App** — app for non‑Dutch speakers to follow COVID‑19 news  
- **Women in Data Science (WiDS) Datathon** — participant  
- **Women in Entrepreneurship Innovation (Germany)** — cohort participant  
- **CyberMentor** — mentoring girls in STEM  

## Tools
- **RegOmics** — Regulatory extraction for Omics data (R/Shiny)
  - App: https://nhannguyen.shinyapps.io/RegOmics_Rshinyapp/  
  - Code: https://github.com/NhanNguyen000/RegOmics  

<p class="cta">
  <a class="btn btn-primary btn-lg" href="contact.html#book">Book a Decision Call</a>
  <a class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-lg" href="mailto:aa@gmail.com">Email: aa@gmail.com</a>
</p>
